zh.lifeSummary: 當James Barrett Sr.於1612年7月26日出生在英國時，他的父親Humphrey Barrett20歲，母親Mary Hawes22歲。他於1643年與Hannah Fosdick在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1672年8月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可哈爾斯托享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Barrett Sr.于1612年7月26日出生在英国时，他的父亲Humphrey Barrett20岁，母亲Mary Hawes22岁。他于1643年与Hannah Fosdick在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1672年8月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可哈爾斯托享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Old French barat, Middle English bar(r)at, bar(r)et(te) ‘trouble, distress’, later ‘deception, fraud; contention, strife’. Through Norman settlement it also became common in Ireland, where it was Gaelicized as Baróid (Munster) and Baréid (Connacht).

variants.name: Barret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Matthieu, Mirlande, Philippe.

French: derivative of the topographic name   Barre   1 ‘barrier’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 3 below) is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Baratta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Pasquale, Alfonse, Antonio, Carmela, Guido, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian: occupational name for a market trader, especially in northern Italy, from baratta ‘exchange, sale, buying and selling’, a derivative of barattare ‘to barter’. See also Barrett .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When James Barrett Sr. was born on 26 July 1612, in England, his father, Humphrey Barrett, was 20 and his mother, Mary Hawes, was 22. He married Hannah Fosdick in 1643, in Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 16 August 1672, in Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 60.

ja., Massachusetts: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州

ja.lifeSummary: James Barrett Sr.が1612年7月26日にイギリスで生まれた時，父Humphrey Barrettは20歳，母Mary Hawesは22歳であった。1643年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーチャーレストウンでHannah Fosdickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1672年8月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスチャーレストウンで60歳で死去した。

ko.Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든

ko.Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드
ko.Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드
ko.Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 찰레스타운
ko.lifeSummary: James Barrett Sr.(이)가 1612년 7월 26일 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humphrey Barrett(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Hawes(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1643년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 찰레스타운에서 Hannah Fosdick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1672년 8월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 찰레스타운에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Barrett Sr. nasceu em 26 de julho de 1612, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Barrett, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mary Hawes, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Fosdick em 1643, em Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de agosto de 1672, em Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Barrett Sr. родился 26 июля 1612 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Humphrey Barrett было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Hawes, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Fosdick в 1643 г. в местности чарльстоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 16 августа 1672 г. в местности чарльстоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Barrett Sr. nació el 26 de julio de 1612, en Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey Barrett, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mary Hawes, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Hannah Fosdick en 1643, en Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de agosto de 1672, en Charlestown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 60 años.
